channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Xiaomi Redmi A7 Pro : ce nouveau smartphone abordable doté d’une batterie de 6 000 mAh est déjà à prix cassé
item.description: Avec le Redmi A7 Pro, Xiaomi propose un smartphone endurant équipé d'un écran confortable, efficace même lorsque l'on a les doigts mouillés. En ce moment, il est affiché à 139,90 euros au lieu de 163 euros.

item.title: No, Google is not ending its 15GB of free Gmail storage policy — it's testing a 5GB initial limit that jumps to the full amount if you add a phone number
item.description: Google's account creation process already asks for a phone number in some cases, and now there's a sweetener.

item.title: Taxe sur les petits colis : un fiasco budgétaire, 2,3 millions par mois au lieu des 400 millions promis
item.description: La taxe sur les petits colis ne rapporte que 2,3 millions d'euros par mois au lieu des 400 millions prévus. Shein, Temu et AliExpress ont contourné le dispositif en 72 heures.

item.title: Here are 40 of our favorite deals from REI’s massive Anniversary Sale
item.description: REI’s annual Anniversary Sale — the retailer’s biggest of the year — has arrived, bringing with it discounts on all kinds of outdoor essentials. If you’ve got a camping trip coming up, now is a good time to stock up on the basics, whether it be a tent, sleeping pad, or stove. If your summer […]

item.title: The Bear season 5: release date, likely cast, plot rumors, and everything else we know about the Hulu show's final chapter
item.description: The Bear season 5 will bring the highly rated, culinary comedy-drama to an end — here's what we know ahead of release.

item.title: The 9 best waterproof Bluetooth speakers, tested poolside
item.description: Mashable audio experts put the best waterproof Bluetooth speakers to the test, evaluating them for sound, ease of use, and durability.

item.title: Nouvelle prouesse de Claude : l’IA sauve 5 bitcoins perdus depuis plus de dix ans
item.description: Claude vient de réaliser un petit miracle. Nourrie d'une foule de données, l'IA d'Anthropic est parvenue à récupérer une poignée de bitcoins perdus plus de dix ans plus tôt. On vous explique comment Claude a réussi à mettre la main sur ce trésor oublié.

item.title: Lenovo unveils a fantastic portable charger to revive your smartphone and more — but bad luck, you'll probably never be able to buy it
item.description: Lenovo Legion P5 10000 power bank offers 100W output, multiple ports, compact design, and low current charging mode support

item.title: On a testé le dernier vélo électrique urbain d’Intersport : charge rapide, courroie et sous les 2 000 €
item.description: Typé sportif mais avec des gènes de vélo électrique urbain, le Nakamura Crosslite mélange habilement les deux genres avec un poids limité, du style et une belle expérience au guidon. Nous l'avons testé, voici notre verdict.

item.title: Mixtape is a musical portrait of teenage life
item.description: Playing Mixtape is like playing a video game version of a high school movie. Kids banter about the meaning of life and the theme songs that would play when they walk in a room. They're worried about looking cool at a big party. They're obsessed with finding booze. But under all of those tropes is […]

item.title: The app you need to clean up your computer
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 128, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, sorry this one's so Mac-heavy, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about David Attenborough and screenwriters-turned-AI-trainers and the Subway Takes […]

item.title: These are the laptops I recommend for pretty much anyone
item.description: Need a new laptop? It’s a tough decision. If you’re like most people, a laptop is one of the most expensive tech purchases you’ll make, and it’s something you’ll use and live with nearly every day for years to come. So there’s a lot riding on this pricey expense. I’ve tested all kinds of laptops, […]

item.title: Googlebook has only just been revealed, but here are 5 things that people hate about the laptop already
item.description: Should Google be booking a plot in the 'Google Graveyard' in advance? Some folks think the Googlebook will be DOA.
